payload.answer: Not grounded. The answer "No conflicts recorded" is only supported if the conflict links or equivalent conflict evidence were actually checked; that verification is not present here.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory should be committed from an unsupported absence claim.

details: Detected an absence claim: "No conflicts recorded."
Available evidence does not establish the negative claim unless conflict links were checked.
No memory cards created because the claim is not durably supported.

repair_options: Check the relevant conflict links/records directly before asserting that no conflicts are recorded.
If conflict records were not checked, revise the answer to preserve uncertainty, e.g. "No conflicts found in the evidence reviewed so far."
Cite the specific conflict-checking evidence used to support the absence claim.
